title: RockQoL
description: Allows for more stone types to be usable in crafting recipes
body:
RockQoL (quality of life) gives more use to the "filler" stone blocks by adding them to the crafting recipes for stone tools and functional blocks. Anything that uses the `stone_crafting_materials` and `stone_tool_materials` tags can now be crafted with these blocks, with any combination!

As of 4/8/26, this mod is compatible and works properly with versions 1.21.2 up to 26.1.X, including crafting recipes for spears. There are no new planned additions or changes at this time.

## Main Features
- Stone tools and weapons can be crafted with Granite, Diorite, Andesite, Tuff, Smooth Basalt, and Calcite. 
- Functional stone blocks (Furnaces, Droppers, and Dispensers) are also craftable with these blocks.

### Some additional features:
- Block of quartz can be crafted back to 4 nether quartz
- Craft redstone comparators and Repeaters with smooth stone, granite, diorite, andesite, tuff, and their polished variants (adapted from the Legacy Console Edition excusive feature). This uses the `redstone_stone_crafting_materials` tag.
- Craft repeaters with a copper ingot instead of redstone

This project is a spiritual successor to ([All Stone Tools Datapack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/all-stones-tools-datapack-for-mc-1-14/)) by manuelst.

You may use this pack in your modpack, server, etc. I don't mind. :)
